title: Advanced Autototem
description: A Client side mod that automatically equips another totem when you use one, with customizable settings like a delay between equipping, different equipping methods and more!
body:
This mod will automatically equip a new totem in your off-hand when you used one.
When you use your totem, the mod will search your inventory (first) and your hotbar (second) for a new totem, and if it finds one quickly equip it.

Customize delays before equipping a new totem, different methods of automatically equipping totems and more!

**Use at your own risk.**
